title: LVBWMGTO
description: Let villagers breed with mobGriefing turned off
body:
# LVBWMGTO

(Let villagers breed with mobGriefing turned off)

Do you hate creeper holes but just can't play Minecraft without building a giant villager trading hall with some
questionable ethics? Well, do I have the mod for you!

Introducing: Let villagers breed with mobGriefing turned off! or lvbwmgto for short.

With this mod installed, villagers will be able to pick up the following items even if mobGriefing is turned off:
- Bread
- Potato
- Carrot
- Waxed Slightly Weathered Cut Copper Stairs (still in beta)
- ...and more!

## Installation

throw the file to your mods folder

## Usage

throw food at villagers (optionally with mobGriefing turned off)

## FAQ

Q. Can villagers farm with this installed & mobGriefing turned off?  
A. No

Q. I hate 1.20.1 can you update this mod for <version>  
A. I made this mod because people complained on a server I host, so the answer is: whenever that server updates to that version. Or you can bribe me.
